chive-sidebar-nav: Label at the top of the left sidebar.
chive-sidebar-collapse: Tooltip/aria-label for the sidebar toggle when sidebar is open (click will collapse it).
chive-sidebar-expand: Tooltip/aria-label for the sidebar toggle when sidebar is collapsed (click will expand it).
chive-section-upload: Heading for the file upload section in the sidebar.
chive-upload-main: Main text inside the drag-and-drop upload zone.
chive-upload-sub: Secondary text inside the upload zone. May contain basic HTML (br, strong).
chive-upload-loaded-main: Upload zone main text after files have been loaded.
chive-upload-loaded-sub: Upload zone secondary text after files have been loaded.
chive-section-files: Heading for the loaded files list section.
chive-no-files: Placeholder shown when no files are loaded.
chive-files-loaded: Summary of how many files are loaded. $1 = count. Uses PLURAL.
chive-file-meta: Metadata line for one file. $1 = row count, $2 = column count, $3 = file size.
chive-remove-file: Aria-label for the remove button. $1 = file name.
chive-section-columns: Heading for the column selection section.
chive-action-only-numeric: Quick-action button: select only numeric columns.
chive-action-only-text: Quick-action button: select only text columns.
chive-btn-advance: Primary button that advances to the next step. Include the → glyph.
chive-empty-title: Heading in the main area when no file is loaded.
chive-card-preview: Title of the data preview card.
chive-tab-preview: Tab label that switches the main result area to the preview/statistics view.
chive-tab-charts: Tab label that switches the main result area to the chart visualizations view.
chive-badge-preview: Badge in the preview card. $1 = total rows, $2 = rows shown, $3 = visible columns, $4 = total columns.
chive-no-columns-selected: Message inside the preview area when no columns are selected.
chive-card-charts: Title of the chart visualization card.
chive-charts-badge: Badge in chart card header. $1 = count of currently visible columns, $2 = count of visible numeric columns.
chive-chart-bar-title: Heading for the bar chart block.
chive-chart-scatter-title: Heading for the scatter plot block.
chive-chart-control-bar-category: Label for the select control that chooses which column is used as bar-chart category.
chive-chart-control-scatter-x: Label for the select control that chooses the X-axis column for scatter plot.
chive-chart-control-scatter-y: Label for the select control that chooses the Y-axis column for scatter plot.
chive-chart-option-none: Placeholder option text for chart selectors when nothing is selected.
chive-chart-empty-bar: Message shown when bar chart cannot be rendered due to missing suitable visible columns.
chive-chart-empty-scatter: Message shown when scatter chart cannot be rendered due to missing visible numeric columns.
chive-chart-no-data: Message shown when a chart has no plottable rows after data cleaning/filtering.
chive-stats-badge: Badge in the stats card. $1 = number of numeric columns. Uses PLURAL.
chive-stat-valid: Label for the count of non-null numeric values in a column.
chive-lang-label: Label for the language selector in the header.
chive-type-number: Display label for numeric columns (used in column list tags and table footer). Keep short.
chive-type-text: Display label for text columns (used in column list tags and table footer). Keep short.
chive-warn-large-file: Confirmation warning before parsing a large file. $1 = file name, $2 = current file size (formatted), $3 = recommended max size.
chive-warn-large-rows: Confirmation warning after parsing when row count is large. $1 = file name, $2 = parsed row count (formatted), $3 = recommended max row count (formatted).
chive-error-format: Error when user uploads an unsupported file type. $1 = file name.
chive-error-read: Error when the browser fails to read a file. $1 = file name.
chive-error-unknown: Fallback error message when the failure reason is unknown.
